textByHash.e345cd25c4df584d4517255939aa7df38eac6734: Here you go Horacio, it's all yours!
textByHash.6f84767fd11257d5fa9e03b6a78d2b22f104e113: Hey, , would you like to come and perform in a mime show?
textByHash.0dfaba62b9bf20549ddc8173b80d1b0bc8f64f9d: You need to copy the mime's performance, then you'll be returned to where you were.
textByHash.9441722ebff3a085a2b802f5fba8cbce979166e6: Hey, , would you like to come and solve a maze for me?
textByHash.442233748c573410f0196e29685a5e8f471763c5: Reach the maze centre as fast as possible. The faster you are, the better your reward.
textByHash.50411c7f55a0be69e982eae73f8f6c5795560ac0: Ah, so you are there. I hoped you would talk to me, I get so lonely. Here, have a present! I must be going now though.
textByHash.8f523b22b736602af187f163de210abf0341187c: Sorry, I'm trying to speak to someone else, but he seems to be ignoring me.
textByHash.b80ad9e0d5d2334bdb7f2eca39fda549a08f18e6: Sorry, I'm trying to speak to someone else, but she seems to be ignoring me.
textByHash.89e292320f8ce653537f88e3b754e5f0b3d30227: Sorry, I'm trying to speak to someone else, but they seems to be ignoring me.
textByHash.5f0125cdb34565201258c5c4cfe11b492290ba9a: I'd like to talk to you!
textByHash.192f2368ffb57bc86a80902194f5d8e71cd72a1e: I'm sorry, but you are no use to me.
textByHash.7411799d92f5fad46ea31f6562c476cf1021adca: Here, take this. But tell no one I was here.
textByHash.fe0bf77f166682aad6326fad81de1e66113a35e6: Well done! I have new information to share with you.
textByHash.029f14b78b3b707eb397d6ea238ea9f0501a7b98: Well done! It's time to take your reward!
